steps.t: Gather some foul flowers from Vinca's basket. Vinca wants you to decorate a couple of tables around the Party Tree with her flowers.
Vinca is targeting two tables around the Party Tree, specifically the ones with empty vases. You should place your flowers in the vases while avoiding…
The tables now have bouquets of smelly flowers thanks to your efforts. Vinca will want to hear about your deed.
